status: targeted code-path validation on synthetic backgrounds; not TESS flight-data evidence
validated_components: injection-window exclusion around both event directions
recovered SNR margin above the strongest same-curve brightening control
per-target and pooled propagation of the control-adjusted SNR
limitations: This validates software behavior, not completeness or false-alarm rates on TESS observations.
Brightenings include astrophysical flares and instrumental events and are not automatically false alarms.
Two recovery trials are a regression fixture, not a scientific sample size.
